---
title: "windows"
---

Windows contribution to $a_\mu$.

References:

- https://arxiv.org/abs/2206.15084 (eqs. 18, 19, 20, 21)
- https://arxiv.org/pdf/2411.08852 (eqs. 8, 9, 10, 11)
- https://arxiv.org/pdf/1801.07224 (RBC/UKQCD set the convention)

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`gm2/HVP/windows.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/windows.py)
:::


## API Reference

### `TimeModulator` {#timemodulator}

```python
class TimeModulator
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/windows.py#L20){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `TimeModulator.SD` {#timemodulator-sd}

```python
def SD(t_fm)
```

Short distance

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/windows.py#L22){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `TimeModulator.W` {#timemodulator-w}

```python
def W(t_fm: np.float128)
```

Window

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/windows.py#L28){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `TimeModulator.LD` {#timemodulator-ld}

```python
def LD(t_fm: np.float128)
```

Long Distance

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/windows.py#L34){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `TimeModulator.full` {#timemodulator-full}

```python
def full(t_fm: np.float128)
```

full contrbution, no modulation. It is equivalent to the sum of the 3 windows: SD, W, LD

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/windows.py#L40){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

### `a_mu` {#a_mu}

```python
class a_mu
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/windows.py#L47){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `a_mu.with_precomputed_K` {#a_mu-with_precomputed_k}

```python
def with_precomputed_K(window: Literal['SD', 'W', 'LD', 'full'], a_fm: np.float128, t_lat: np.ndarray, Vi: np.ndarray, K: np.ndarray, Z_ren: float, strategy: str)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/gm2/HVP/windows.py#L49){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
